summary: Phase 3 implementation reviewed against the spec and plan: review-decision schema, validate integration, advance gate, closure gate, and soft check-ready warning all implemented with TDD. Authority boundaries preserved; historical runs remain valid.
tested: review-decision schema accepts all dispositions and pins consistency
validate loads and semantically validates indexed review-decision.json
advance gates review-related targets on review decision
advance -> completed enforces handoff and memory closure
check-ready warns on memory files declared without memory_update
residual_risks: required-decision gate scoped to triage targets (reviewed, review_blocked) per plan-time refinement
